chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. Nos.D-4113 and 4114 of 2020 Muhammad Anis AND Ghulam Mustafa Shaikh Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main cases. Dated: 12.05.2025 None for the petitioners. Ms. Zehra Sehar Vayani, Assistant Attorney General. -.-.- These are olds petitions of 2020, which are over five years old. Lastly these were taken up on 25.05.2022 which is over three years ago when a counsel held brief for learned counsel for the petitioners. In the last three years learned counsel for the petitioners failed to diligent proceed with this petition. Today despite lapse of three years learned counsel for the petitioners is called absent without intimation. It appears that the petitioners have lost interest in pursuing these old petitions which are accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Head of Const. Benches Judge
